title: Yen hits its lowest level in 39.5 years, surpassing 162 yen to the dollar
summary: The Japanese currency weakens against the US dollar, approaching historic levels and raising expectations of currency intervention.

title: Japan prepares for crucial match against Brazil in 2026 World Cup
summary: The Japanese team plays the early morning match hoping to upset the five-time champion, as fans gather in Houston.

title: Suspect arrested for discovery of buried body in Hiroshima in theft and murder case
summary: Authorities arrest a 29-year-old man for the murder of a person whose body was found underground, allegedly to conceal another crime.

title: Shooting at youth center in northern Germany leaves five dead
summary: Two suspects were arrested after the attack at a support facility for teenagers in the north of the country.

title: Train derailment at Kyoto station on Kintetsu line affects 85,000 passengers
summary: The accident left no injuries but interrupted service, as the safety agency investigates the causes.

title: Diet seat reduction project advances without consensus and with strong opposition
summary: The ruling party forces the start of the debate despite the absence of the opposition, which calls the measure undemocratic.

title: Controversy over statements denying possibility of Princess Aiko ascending to throne
summary: Comments by a former minister about exclusively male succession generate criticism and revive debate on reforming the imperial law.

title: Prosecution seeks life imprisonment for accused in murder of 'Gyoza no Osho' president
summary: The trial determines that the crime was organized and planned by a leader of a criminal organization.

title: Singer Kazuya Kamenashi and presenter Minami Tanaka announce wedding and pregnancy
summary: The Japanese couple communicated the news through a joint statement and handwritten signatures.

title: Death threats against South Korea coach after World Cup elimination
summary: The South Korean coach returns to the country under heavy police protection after receiving threats and public insults.

title: 139 children at a Tokyo elementary school suffer food poisoning
summary: Most cases are thought to be related to norovirus, leading to absences and temporary withdrawals.

title: Japan creates interministerial committee to review foreign investments for security risks
summary: The new body seeks to strengthen control of foreign investments in strategic sectors, similar to the US CFIUS.

title: Body of a man found with bear bite marks on Mount Hakkoda
summary: It is suspected he was attacked by a bear while collecting bamboo shoots; two other hikers remain missing.

title: Information sought on whereabouts of Yoichi Hatta, suspect in hit-and-run
summary: Four years after the accident, authorities renew the public appeal to find his whereabouts.

title: Wimbledon 2025 starts with Shinji Mochizuki advancing and Serena Williams returning
summary: The Japanese tennis player advances to the second round while the 44-year-old American returns to compete in the Grand Slam tournament.

title: Thai mother sentenced to 7 and a half years in prison for prostituting her daughter
summary: The woman was found guilty of human trafficking for forcing her 12-year-old daughter to perform sexual services.

title: High school student drowns off Niigata coast
summary: The teenager was swept away by the wind while fishing on breakwater blocks and could not return; another companion remains missing.

title: China expands export ban list against Japan to include 20 Japanese companies
summary: The Chinese government adds new sanctions in the framework of the technological and trade dispute between the two countries.

title: Family of victim in Ohkawara case demands explanations for unjust detention
summary: The bereaved question the repeated rejections of bail requests in a case considered a miscarriage of justice.

title: Man sentenced to 30 years in prison for arson that killed three in Aichi
summary: The court determined that the defendant acted with conditional intent when setting fire to an apartment in Yatomi.
